# Pronunciation credits

Below are the full credits for the various audio clips used in this repository. All clips were sourced from [Wiktionary](https://en.wiktionary.org/).

The names listed here indicate authorship of the original audio files only. Their inclusion does **not** imply any endorsement of this site or its contents by the original creators or by Wiktionary.

## A

### acht

**Title / Description:** Pronunciation of *acht* (original file: `De-acht2.ogg`)  
**Author / Creator:** Jeuwre  
**Source:** [Wiktionary file page](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/File:De-acht2.ogg)  
**License:** [Creative Commons Attribution–ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)  
**Modifications:** Local filename changed from `De-acht2.ogg` to `acht.ogg`; audio content otherwise unchanged.

### achtunddreißig

**Title / Description:** Pronunciation of *achtunddreißig* (original file: `De-achtunddreißig.ogg`)  
**Author / Creator:** Jeuwre  
**Source:** [Wiktionary file page](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/File:De-achtunddreißig.ogg)  
**License:** [Creative Commons Attribution–ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)  
**Modifications:** Local filename changed from `De-achtunddreißig.ogg` to `achtunddreißig.ogg`; audio content otherwise unchanged.

**Title / Description:** Pronunciation of *achtundvierzig* (original file: `De-achtundvierzig2.ogg`)

**License:** [Creative Commons Attribution–ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)  
**Modifications:** Local filename changed from `De-achtundvierzig2.ogg` to `achtundvierzig.ogg`; audio content otherwise unchanged.
